calls.notes: SELECT by primary key using request.Id from the body. Returns null when no row exists — causes immediate HTTP 404 return.
Guard.Against.NullOrEmpty(Name), Guard.Against.NullOrEmpty(Description), Guard.Against.NegativeOrZero(Price). Sets Name, Description, Price on the entity. PictureUri is NOT touched.
Guard.Against.Zero(catalogBrandId). Sets CatalogBrandId on the entity.
Guard.Against.Zero(catalogTypeId). Sets CatalogTypeId on the entity.
Persists Name, Description, Price, CatalogBrandId, CatalogTypeId. PictureUri is unchanged.
Leaf — rewrites the stored (unchanged) PictureUri to an absolute URL for the response DTO.
